g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the EEG and perception step in Noosphere')
sendPrompt('Explain the Perceive step — S4, GNN, tokenizer, fusion')
sendPrompt('Explain the Model step — RSSM and physics')
sendPrompt('Explain the Plan step — MCTS in latent space')
sendPrompt('Explain the Act step — ActBridge, executors')
sendPrompt('Explain the Observe step — replay buffer, episodic memory')
sendPrompt('Explain the Learn step — Phase A, B, C training')

svg.text: continuous loop · no episode barrier · checkpointed by trainer.py
